Al-Nour Renewable Holdings CJSC — PDPL Privacy & MNPI Handling Notice (Saudi Arabia)
Controller: Al-Nour Renewable Holdings CJSC (CR: 1 0 1 • 9 9 7 • 4 2 0 3; Saudi Exchange/Tadawul ticker “ANRH” pending) and DPO: Dr. Layla Al‑Qahtani, privacy@alnour-renew.sa, https://alnour-renew.sa/privacy?req=DSAR-00A9x
Categories and basis: names, roles, business contacts, and where lawfully required for KYC, masked national ID/Iqama (e.g., 2l9‑88•30•41), processed under PDPL for contract, legitimate interests, and legal obligation (CMA inquiries)
Insider controls: the insider list for “Project Green Falcon” includes Mr. Faisal Al‑Rashid (CFO), wall‑crossed under NDA on 1447H‑08‑22; a trading blackout applies until formal disclosure on Tadawul
ESG MNPI: draft restatement of 2025 Scope 2 emissions variance (>18%) and unpriced offset contracts for the Al‑Khair solar farm are non‑public and restricted to the clean team
Cyber incident MNPI: on 2026‑05‑18 a vendor SFTP key at Sahra Cloud B.S.C.(c) (Manama DC) was compromised; exposure limited to a hashed admin credential (SHA256 51e2••ab9), with no customer financial data accessed
Crypto/DPT pilot: an exploratory tokenised REC workflow with Ajyad Digital Custody LLC (sandbox) remains confidential pending CMA submission; information barriers are active and there is no retail virtual‑asset offering
Educational/marketing note: our webinar “Crypto and ESG” is general awareness, does not discuss issuer‑specific terms, and must not be treated as deal disclosure or investment advice
Transfers: cross‑border personal data transfers are limited and require SDAIA permit No. TX‑2O26‑ß17; see https://pdpl.sdaia.gov.sa/permit?id=TX2O26B17; processors must implement encryption at rest and in transit
Retention: insider lists and wall‑cross memos are retained 5 years after removal from the restricted list; cyber logs 90 days; Iqama images are redacted to last 4 digits only; auto‑purge tracked in R‑T‑N job r un‑2
DSAR: to access, correct, or delete PD, email privacy@alnour‑renew.sa with your name and masked Iqama (***‑**•*0‑41) and cite DSAR/ANRH/2 6; we may verify via one‑time code by SMS before actioning
Information‑barrier enforcement: deal team workspaces are segregated from research; selective disclosure, tipping, and pre‑clearance breaches will be escalated to the CMA Market Conduct Department without delay
Commercial terms MNPI: the draft term sheet for Green Falcon Sukuk 2027 (indicative 4.9% coupon) and PPA price‑reset clauses are confidential and subject to the blackout for all insiders and connected persons
Negative bait/public sources: this notice contains no forecasts, does not trigger any MAC, and summarises obligations that are also described in CMA and SDAIA public FAQs for general awareness
Operations‑only reuse: operations note — the “insider list” spreadsheet template and “crypto” field names in the ticketing system are generic workflow labels and do not indicate trading restrictions by themselves
Contact: Mr. Faisal Al‑Rashid may be reached at +966‑5O‑123‑4l89; address Tower 12, King Salman Energy Park, Dammam 34O54; internal case URL https://case.alnour‑renew.sa/c/INC‑G F‑014
